strategy: Upgrade existing Scanner from aggregate scores to drill-down detail. No Flow Editor rewrite. Just make current Scanner useful: per-skill scores, broken references, anti-pattern detectors. Wireframe = end-state spec.

tasks.title: Fix Secure cookie flag for proxy
QA end-to-end test through browser
tasks.evidence: 4/4 input methods PASS on Vercel (GitHub URL 9.2, ZIP 9.2/8.4, Folder 8.4)

tasks.title: Add Clear Results button
tasks.evidence: Red trash icon, clears analysis but keeps input

tasks.title: Fix deepAnalyze scenario pass-through
tasks.evidence: Was hardcoded to 'prompt', now passes store.scenario

tasks.title: Test evaluate-deep on Vercel with real LLM
Extract P-MAS patterns for AAA-studio roadmap
tasks.evidence: 9 metrics, 7 anti-patterns, VRS, Skill classification, Grade A-F

tasks.title: Add Quality Analyzer page to in-app Wiki

roadmap.name: Agent-Scanner — QA becomes an agent with tools
roadmap.vision: Incrementally upgrade Scanner UI. Steps 1-2 are pure UI. Step 3 adds anti-pattern detectors. No Flow Editor rewrite.

tasks.title: Smoke test: run current QA on zai-agent-toolkit (110+ skills)
tasks.evidence: Scanner found 126 files, 46 skills, 20 standards but scored F/0 (LLM JSON parse bug). Proved format-dependency limitation.

tasks.title: Define agent tools for scanner (read_file, list_dir, grep, compare)
tasks.evidence: P0: read_file, list_dir, grep, stat_file, compare. P1: parse_frontmatter, count_blocks, extract_ids, validate_schema, exec. Plus: fix existing scanner bugs.

tasks.title: Skill detail table + References detail (UI-only)
tasks.evidence: scanner-skill-table.tsx + scanner-ref-list.tsx + scanner-panel.tsx with 4 sub-tabs. Copy all/row buttons.

tasks.title: Completeness criteria expansion + per-skill recommendations
tasks.evidence: Added Purpose/Architecture/About/Installation aliases. Avg completeness 42→48. Grade C→B (70). Per-skill recs: 'Add ## Purpose — missing in: X, Y, Z'.

tasks.title: Fix classifier: exclude references/docs/evals from skills
tasks.evidence: 88→45 skills (removed 54 false positives). Avg completeness 48→66. Zero refs/docs/evals classified as skill.

tasks.title: Anti-pattern detectors (3-4)
tasks.notes: Inline Dup, Unregistered STD, Version Drift, Missing Examples.

tasks.title: Re-test with drill-down + export
tasks.notes: Verify detail tables, per-skill scores, broken refs, anti-patterns on zai-agent-toolkit.

roadmap.name: SonarMAS — 9-Metric Quality Engine (wireframe Tab Quality)
roadmap.notes: Depends on Epic 4 findings. Data from 4.6 determines what to build. From P-MAS wireframe: 9 metrics, A-F grade, radar chart.

tasks.title: Implement 9-metric weighted scoring engine
tasks.notes: Skill Completeness, Standard Coverage, Cross-Ref Integrity, Anti-Pattern Score, Version Consistency, Doc Freshness, Test Coverage, Registry Alignment, Conflict Resolution

tasks.title: Add Grade A-F badge + Radar chart
Implement 7 anti-pattern detectors (from wireframe Tab Issues)
Skill Classification (5 axes) + Standard Classification (4 types)

keyDecisions.title: No separate wireframe build
keyDecisions.decision: P-MAS-architector wireframe = target spec for AAA-studio QA, NOT a separate project. Build in phases inside AAA-studio.

keyDecisions.title: No Flow Editor rewrite
keyDecisions.decision: Current Scanner works. Just make it useful: drill-down not rebuild.

keyDecisions.title: Real data first, roadmap second
keyDecisions.decision: Test on zai-agent-toolkit (110+ skills) BEFORE building Epic 5. Data drives what metrics/detectors to implement.

keyDecisions.title: UI-only changes first
keyDecisions.decision: Steps 1-2 pure UI. API already returns ParsedSkill[], ReferenceCheck[].

qaTestResults.pattern: Examples consistently lowest (4-6/10). All other dimensions 9+. Static text analysis works but limited to format-dependent parsing.
qaTestResults.conclusion: Next step: agent-scanner approach (Epic 4) to decouple from format. Test on real toolkit (110+ skills) before building more metrics.

gates.epicGate: npx tsc --noEmit && bun run build && bunx verify-docs --ci
